title: NYSE Real Time Analysis
description: Crafted a comprehensive application encompassing all companies listed in the New York Stock Exchange, providing real day updates and analysis on firm activities and developments.

link.title: World Bank Projects in Taiwan - R Shiny Application
link.description: Developed a R Shiny application utilizing dplyr, tidyverse, and ggplot2 to visualize World Bank project trends in Taiwan, allowing researchers to interact with archival data and derive policy prescriptions on determining loan rates.

link.title: Predictive Property Assessment Modeling
link.description: Utilized advanced machine learning frameworks (random forests) and statistical programming tools (R) to evaluate large-scale regional real estate assessment values.

link.title: Restaurant Business Analytics Project
link.description: Leveraged Excel to evaluate sales revenue and profit margins across third-party delivery services and restaurant website, helping the business identify top-performing platforms and implement promotion tactics to boost direct sales. Conducted time-series analysis on consumer preferences and spending patterns, utilizing monthly purchasing trends to enhance pricing strategies and increase marketing campaigns around menu items with high customer demand.

link.title: Military and Education Expenditure - R Shiny Application
link.description: Cleaned, wrangled, and standardized large-scale World Bank datasets using dplyr and tidyverse, resolving missing values, formatting inconsistencies, and duplicate entries to ensure high-quality, reliable data for economic analysis. Created visualizations with ggplot2 to illustrate trends in military expenditure (1960–2019) and explored correlations between education spending and unemployment (2022), highlighting regional disparities and policy-relevant insights.
